intro:

Nepeta imrayana, also known as Nephelea imrayana is a flowering plant species, more specifically a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is reported to have several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions.
